title: Add #![forbid(unsafe_code)] to all no_std public crates where missing
description: Per coding guidelines, ensure lichen-core, lichen-link, lichen-schc, lichen-ipv6, lichen-rpl, lichen-senml, lichen-oscore, lichen-coap etc. have #![forbid(unsafe_code)] at crate root (except FFI). Check for any unsafe blocks.
